screen.shyne_core.cloud.signin.tooltip: Verify using the Minecraft account already signed in to this game
screen.shyne_core.cloud.signout.tooltip: Signed in; click to sign out
screen.shyne_core.cloud.download.tooltip: Restore this private backup as a normal local Avatar folder
screen.shyne_core.cloud.download.disable: Select an Avatar from the list first

screen.shyne_core.cloud.upload.signin.to: Minecraft sign-in is required before backing up

screen.shyne_core.cloud.empty.mine: Your private Cloud storage is empty

screen.shyne_core.cloud.empty.backup: Use Back up active Avatar to store the first one
screen.shyne_core.cloud.start.title: GET STARTED
screen.shyne_core.cloud.start.backup: Back up your active Avatar or select a stored one

screen.shyne_core.cloud.private_notice: Not listed or shared with other users
screen.shyne_core.cloud.private_owner_on: Only this Minecraft account can restore it
screen.shyne_core.cloud.subtitle.public: Secure .sc packages • verified creators • revocable access
screen.shyne_core.cloud.publish.tooltip: Create an encrypted, signed .sc Public Share from the matching active Avatar
screen.shyne_core.cloud.unpublish.toolti: Stop new leases and remove the public .sc package; your private backup stays intact
screen.shyne_core.cloud.public_notice: Encrypted and signed; Minecraft sign-in required to use
screen.shyne_core.cloud.public_protected: The creator can revoke access; lease refresh runs in the background
screen.shyne_core.cloud.empty.public.hel: Try another search or publish one from My Avatars
screen.shyne_core.cloud.permissions.tool: Choose which capabilities this exact Public Avatar package may use
screen.shyne_core.permissions.title: PUBLIC AVATAR PERMISSIONS
screen.shyne_core.permissions.subtitle: %s by %s
screen.shyne_core.permissions.scope: Saved only for this package version; updates require approval again.
screen.shyne_core.permissions.none: This Avatar requests no special capabilities.
screen.shyne_core.permission.particle.de: Allow local visual particle effects. Enabled by default.
screen.shyne_core.permission.sound.descr: Allow local game sounds. Enabled by default.
screen.shyne_core.permission.camera.desc: Dangerous: allow camera offsets and rotations. Disabled by default.
Dangerous: expose voice availability, speaking state, and level. Disabled by default.
screen.shyne_core.permission.command.des: Dangerous: allow rate-limited /shyne and /sjyne commands. Disabled by default.

screen.shyne_core.palette.title: AVATAR ACTIONS
screen.shyne_core.palette.empty: This Avatar has no actions on this page
setting.shyne_core.avatar_models.desc: Render custom avatar parts and attachments
setting.shyne_core.effects.desc: Play visual effects when abilities activate
setting.shyne_core.hints.desc: Show contextual help for Shyne features
setting.shyne_core.debug.desc: Show developer lines and render diagnostics
setting.shyne_core.status.desc: Enable private Avatar backup and cross-device restore
command.shyne.help.title: Shyne Creator command help
command.shyne.help.avatar: Manage Avatars from Esc > Avatars and open Avatar Actions with its configured keybind
command.shyne.help.size: Resize yourself: /shyne size <0.25-4.0> or /shyne size reset
command.shyne.help.player: Server management commands are hidden unless you are an administrator
command.shyne.help.admin.list: Inspect: status, mods, models, skills, weapons, items, profiles, summons, projectiles, errors, report
command.shyne.help.admin.actions: Admin: size <player> <scale|reset>, reload, giveitem, setteam, setmana, grantxp, castskill, attachmodel, playanim, and resetcombo
command.shyne.size.target_changed: An administrator changed your size to %sx
command.shyne.size.target_reset: An administrator reset you to normal size (effective %sx)
command.shyne.size.unavailable: This player does not support resizing
